problem: How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis?
hypothesis: Electrocoagulation for suspended particle removal may resolve How to desalinate seawater at dramatically lower energy cost than reverse osmosis? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
